title: oplismenus helvolus
intro: Oplismenus helvolus, also known as the barbed grass or heliotrope grass, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oplismenus helvolus include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Oplismenus helvolus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments.
